summary: Tested FreeShippingFloatingBanner component. Found and FIXED critical NaN bug (line 49-59 accessing wrong cart item properties). Banner now displays correctly with seller name, progress percentage, and remaining amount.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Banner displayed 'NaN%' and 'ليس رقمًا ل.س' instead of actual values
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: FreeShippingFloatingBanner.js was accessing cart item properties incorrectly. Code used item.seller_id, item.seller_name, item.price but cart API returns item.product.seller_id, item.product.seller_name, item.product.price
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix_applied: Updated lines 49-59 to correctly access nested product properties: item.product?.seller_id, item.product?.seller_name, item.item_price

test1_banner_on_products.description: Banner appears on /products page with cart items
test1_banner_on_products.result: Banner shows 'متجر الأناقة', '49%' progress, '2 متاجر في السلة'

test3_banner_on_food.description: Banner appears on /food page after adding food to cart

test5_banner_shows_closest_seller.description: Banner displays seller closest to free shipping threshold
test5_banner_shows_closest_seller.result: Shows seller with highest progress percentage

test6_banner_shows_multiple_stores.description: Banner shows count when multiple stores in cart

critical_code_review_comments: Added data-testid attributes to banner component for future automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FreeShippingFloatingBanner is now working correctly. It reads cart data from CartContext and FoodCartContext, calculates progress towards free shipping threshold for each seller, and displays the seller closest to reaching free shipping. Component has data-testid='free-shipping-banner' for automated testing. Hidden paths: /cart, /food/my-cart, /checkout, /food/batch-checkout
